  - evaluated_keys: `map_public_ip_on_launch`

  - check: `Amazon EC2 인스턴스가 Public IP를 가지고 있고, Security Group과 함께 인터넷과 직접 통신 가능한 상태`
  - check_id: `CKV_AWS_88`
  - check_name_en: `EC2 instance should not have public IP.`
  - severity: `HIGH`
  - mitre_tactic: `IA`

  - resource_address: `aws_instance.super_critical_security_server`
  - file: `/home/jiyoon/testterraform/ec2.tf`
  - evaluated_keys: `associate_public_ip_address`

[3] 권한·자격 확장

  - check: `IMDSv2 미설정(aws_instance)`
  - check_id: `CKV_AWS_79`
  - check_name_en: `Ensure Instance Metadata Service Version 1 is not enabled`
  - severity: `HIGH`
  - mitre_tactic: `PE`
  - representative_atomic_id: `T1552`
  - why_fails: IMDSv2 미설정(aws_instance)
  - mitigation: aws_instance 리소스 metadata_options에 http_tokens = "required" 설정
  - resource_address: `aws_instance.super_critical_security_server`

  - check_name_en: `Ensure that EC2 is EBS optimized`
  - severity: `MEDIUM`
  - mitre_tactic: `DE`
  - representative_atomic_id: `T1068`
  - why_fails: 필수 보안 설정 누락(설명 기반)

  - resource_address: `aws_instance.super_critical_security_server`
  - file: `/home/jiyoon/testterraform/ec2.tf`
  - evaluated_keys: `ebs_optimized`

representative_evidence.check_name: Ensure the default security group of every VPC restricts all traffic
representative_evidence.mitigation: aws_default_security_group 리소스의 기본 보안 그룹에서 불필요한 ingress/egress 규칙을 제거
representative_evidence.capability: 기본 보안그룹이 제한되지 않음(원격 접근/이상행위 탐지 어려움)

  - check_name_en: `Ensure the default security group of every VPC restricts all traffic`
  - severity: `HIGH`
  - mitre_tactic: `IA`

  - why_fails: 기본 SG 미제한

  - evaluated_keys: `egress/to_port, egress/from_port 외 7개`

  - mitre_tactic: `DE`
  - representative_atomic_id: `T1046`
  - why_fails: VPC Flow Logs 미설정
  - mitigation: aws_vpc 리소스에 VPC Flow Logs를 활성화
  - resource_address: `aws_vpc.vpc`
  - file: `/home/jiyoon/testterraform/vpc.tf`
  - evaluated_keys: `networking, resource_type`

representative_evidence.check_name: Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
representative_evidence.mitigation: aws_iam_group_policy 정책에서 Action/Resource 와일드카드를 제거하고 최소 권한으로 축소
representative_evidence.capability: IAM 와일드카드/관리자급 권한 남용 우려. 리소스/권한 제한이 충분히 특정되지 않음.
